record_existence_and_kind.command: sqlite3 -header -csv data/canonical.db "select r.record_id,r.record_kind,r.display_name,r.primary_source_id,e.entity_name,e.name,e.agency_name,e.short_name,e.acronym,e.entity_type from records r join entities e using(record_id) where r.record_id in ('entity_meeting-doc-104761-mta-real-estate','entity_meeting-doc-105786-mta-real-estate','entity_meeting-doc-114016-mta-real-estate','entity_meeting-doc-124206-mta-real-estate','entity_meeting-doc-mta-real-estate','entity_mta-real-estate','entity_meeting-doc-151836-mta-tod','entity_meeting-doc-170991-tod','entity_meeting-doc-mta-tod','entity_mta-tod-meeting-doc-160301','entity_170871-mtapd','entity_meeting-doc-79341-mta-pd','entity_annual-report-2021-mtapd') order by r.record_id;"
record_existence_and_kind.result: Returned all 13 selected alias/target records, each with record_kind=entity. The MTA Real Estate records share entity_name/display_name MTA Real Estate; the TOD records share entity_name MTA Transit Oriented Development and acronym TOD; the MTA Police Department records share entity_name MTA Police Department and acronym MTAPD.

existing_alias_conflicts.merges_json_command: jq -r --argjson ids '["entity_meeting-doc-104761-mta-real-estate","entity_meeting-doc-105786-mta-real-estate","entity_meeting-doc-114016-mta-real-estate","entity_meeting-doc-124206-mta-real-estate","entity_meeting-doc-mta-real-estate","entity_meeting-doc-151836-mta-tod","entity_meeting-doc-170991-tod","entity_meeting-doc-mta-tod","entity_170871-mtapd","entity_meeting-doc-79341-mta-pd"]' '.aliases.entity // {} | to_entries[] | select(.key as $k | $ids | index($k)) | [.key,.value] | @tsv' data/identity-overrides/merges.json
existing_alias_conflicts.identity_aliases_command: sqlite3 -header -csv data/canonical.db "select kind,alias,target from identity_aliases where kind='entity' and alias in ('entity_meeting-doc-104761-mta-real-estate','entity_meeting-doc-105786-mta-real-estate','entity_meeting-doc-114016-mta-real-estate','entity_meeting-doc-124206-mta-real-estate','entity_meeting-doc-mta-real-estate','entity_meeting-doc-151836-mta-tod','entity_meeting-doc-170991-tod','entity_meeting-doc-mta-tod','entity_170871-mtapd','entity_meeting-doc-79341-mta-pd');"

do_not_merge_conflicts.db_command: sqlite3 -header -csv data/canonical.db "select kind,record_id_a,record_id_b,reason from do_not_merge where kind='entity' and (record_id_a in (<selected aliases and targets>) or record_id_b in (<selected aliases and targets>));"
do_not_merge_conflicts.json_command: jq -r --argjson ids '[<selected aliases and targets>]' '.pairs.entity[]? | select(any(.record_ids[]; . as $rid | $ids | index($rid))) | [.record_ids[0],.record_ids[1],.reason] | @tsv' data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json

prior_prep_conflicts.command: jq -r --argjson ids '["entity_meeting-doc-104761-mta-real-estate","entity_meeting-doc-105786-mta-real-estate","entity_meeting-doc-114016-mta-real-estate","entity_meeting-doc-124206-mta-real-estate","entity_meeting-doc-mta-real-estate","entity_meeting-doc-151836-mta-tod","entity_meeting-doc-170991-tod","entity_meeting-doc-mta-tod","entity_170871-mtapd","entity_meeting-doc-79341-mta-pd"]' '.proposed_aliases[]? | select(.kind=="entity" and (.alias_id as $a | $ids | index($a))) | [.kind,.alias_id,.target_id] | @tsv' data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch0{47..99}-prep.json data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch100-prep.json data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch101-prep.json data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch102-prep.json 2>/dev/null | sort -u
prior_prep_conflicts.result: Returned no rows; none of the selected alias_ids appeared in prior Codex identity prep artifacts through identity102.

commands: sqlite3 -header -csv data/canonical.db "select lower(trim(coalesce(entity_name,name,agency_name,short_name,display_name))) as norm, count(*) n, group_concat(record_id,' | ') ids, group_concat(display_name,' | ') names from entities join records using(record_id) where record_kind='entity' group by norm having n>1 order by n desc, norm limit 80;"

sqlite3 -header -csv data/canonical.db "select lower(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(trim(coalesce(entity_name,name,agency_name,short_name,display_name)),'.',''),'&','and'),'-',' '),'  ',' '),'  ',' ')) as norm, count(*) n, group_concat(record_id,' | ') ids, group_concat(display_name,' | ') names from entities join records using(record_id) where record_kind='entity' group by norm having n>1 order by n desc, norm limit 120;"

sqlite3 -header -csv data/canonical.db "select acronym, count(*) n, group_concat(record_id,' | ') ids, group_concat(display_name,' | ') names from entities join records using(record_id) where record_kind='entity' and acronym is not null and length(acronym)>1 group by lower(acronym) having n>1 order by n desc, lower(acronym) limit 80;"
candidate_discovery.result: Selected exact or acronym-consistent organizational clusters only. Community-board, committee-member, and ambiguous acronym clusters were left out.

commands: sqlite3 -header -csv data/canonical.db "select source_id,block_id,substr(replace(replace(raw_text,char(10),' '),char(13),' '),1,260) as block_text from blocks_fts where source_id='meeting_doc_124206' and blocks_fts match '\"MTA Real Estate\" OR \"Real Estate\"' order by block_id limit 40;"

sqlite3 -header -csv data/canonical.db "select source_id,block_id,substr(replace(replace(raw_text,char(10),' '),char(13),' '),1,260) as block_text from blocks_fts where source_id='meeting_doc_151836' and blocks_fts match '\"Transit Oriented Development\" OR TOD' order by block_id limit 40;"

sqlite3 -header -csv data/canonical.db "select source_id,block_id,substr(replace(replace(raw_text,char(10),' '),char(13),' '),1,260) as block_text from blocks_fts where source_id='meeting_doc_160301' and blocks_fts match '\"Transit Oriented Development\" OR TOD' order by block_id limit 40;"

sqlite3 -header -csv data/canonical.db "select source_id,block_id,substr(replace(replace(raw_text,char(10),' '),char(13),' '),1,260) as block_text from blocks_fts where source_id='meeting_doc_79341' and blocks_fts match '\"MTA Police Department\" OR MTAPD' order by block_id limit 40;"
source_evidence.result: Confirmed direct citeable source blocks for the selected MTA Real Estate, MTA Transit Oriented Development/TOD, and MTA Police Department/MTAPD records.

scope_and_rejection_notes: Only global record kind entity is proposed.
No project, corridor, route, or treatment_component records are included.
Dropped community-board clusters because same-number boards across boroughs are not safe global duplicates.
Dropped committee/member snapshot clusters where records may represent a committee, a membership roster, or a meeting-specific role rather than one stable entity.
